name: Hot and Sour Cabbage
recipeInstructions:
1. Shred the cabbage. Remove seeds from the hot peppers and slice them. Assemble the other ingredients.
2. Heat the oil in a wok until it reaches the smoking point. Add the hot peppers and stir-fry for about half a minute. Add the shredded cabbage, salt, and pepper, and stir thoroughly to coat. Cook for another 2 minutes.
3. Add 1/2 cup water, cider vinegar, soya sauce, and brown sugar. Stir everything together.
4. Cover the wok and cook over low heat for 8-10 minutes, lifting the cover occasionally to stir the mixture.
